codeReview.evidence: Final rerun code review approved after strict no-excuse cleanup. Non-blocking watch notes are documented in the report; no blockers remain.

manualQa.evidence: CLI/data surfaces passed for behavioral RED/GREEN, focused tests, full API tests, lint, compile, imports, greps, and scope baseline.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: temporary c6eb4db worktree plus final test file, then final focused pytest
no-excuse checker, ruff, py_compile, import/settings, git diff --check, package-boundary greps

adversarialCases.scenario: No real GPU or hardware encoder is required; tests use monkeypatches and pure command builders.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Focused tests pass without device access.

adversarialCases.scenario: Hardware encode failure leaves partial HLS output before fallback.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Partial output is removed before software retry.

adversarialCases.scenario: Out-of-scope dirty paths are visible in git status.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Scope artifact records baseline instead of reverting unrelated state.

adversarialCases.scenario: No-excuse checker runs on touched Plan 008 Python files.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Checker reports no violations and test module stays at or below 250 pure LOC.

artifactRefs.description: Behavioral RED/GREEN transcript using temporary baseline worktree.

gateReview.evidence: Final gate rerun approved; no-excuse checker, focused tests, full API suite, ruff, py_compile, import/settings sanity, package-boundary greps, and diff check passed.

rerunCommands: rtk uvx ruff check packages/transcoder/hwaccel.py packages/transcoder/ffmpeg_transcoder.py apps/api/config.py apps/api/tasks/transcode_tasks.py apps/api/tests/test_transcoder_hwaccel.py
python -m py_compile packages/transcoder/hwaccel.py packages/transcoder/ffmpeg_transcoder.py apps/api/config.py apps/api/tasks/transcode_tasks.py apps/api/tests/test_transcoder_hwaccel.py
iteration.evidence: Final reruns passed after strict no-excuse cleanup and reviewer/gate reruns approved.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: Execute Plan 008 hardware-accelerated transcode with settings, fallback, tests, evidence, and reviewer approval.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: FFmpeg transcoder selects configured or auto hardware H.264 backend, falls back to software safely, preserves software HLS output shape, and remains package-boundary clean.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: Current source satisfies the requested behavior; all CLI/data verification surfaces pass; final code, QA, and gate reviewers approved.
